extracted.title: UPDATED CAPACITY REDUCTION – TCLI East Lateral
extracted.description:
TCLI has revised the dates for planned maintenance on Unit #2 at Gillis Compressor Station on the East Lateral. As a result, capacity will be reduced as follows:

3/24 – 3/25 (previously 3/23 – 3/25) TCLI East Lateral (LOC #EastLat) 250 MMcf/d (leaving 1,150 MMcf/d)

TCLI anticipates this posting may result in Firm Primary, Firm Secondary and Interruptible curtailments. Estimated impact to Firm Primary as follows:

15% - Based on the Current Net Shipper Nominations
20% - Based on the Current Contracted MDQ

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 800-827-5267

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
2026 TCLI System Planned Maintenance Schedule 20260320.pdf
